introSection: Luna is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Liseberg in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Luna was announced in December 2021 as part of a new themed area called Luna Park.

In October 2022, track pieces began to arrive at the park. It opened on 22 April 2023.

fullText:
Luna is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Liseberg in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden.

Luna was announced in December 2021 as part of a new themed area called Luna Park.

In October 2022, track pieces began to arrive at the park. It opened on 22 April 2023.
